title: The Oak & The Reeds
content:
Giant Oak, in his strength & his scorn
    Of the winds, by the roots was uptorn:
    But slim Reeds at his side,
    The fierce gale did outride,
    Since, by bending the burden was borne.

    Bend, Not Break
meaning:
"The Oak & The Reeds" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
